mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the labor market signals impending economic contraction, prompting corporate earnings downgrades and risk-off equity positioning that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment, or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous strength in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls confirms broad-based consumer demand expansion, which lifts cyclical equity valuations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline in out-of-sample testing, or forward returns turn negative when both proxies rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production stagnation indicates supply-side bottlenecks that compress corporate margins, triggering earnings revisions downward and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive when INDPRO falls below the threshold, or the signal exhibits no statistical edge after adjusting for sector rotation factors.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real GDP growth expands the aggregate earnings base for public corporations, mechanically supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns across all market conditions.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP revisions consistently move in the opposite direction of subsequent 60-day equity returns, or the signal's predictive power vanishes during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation exceeding the Federal Reserve's implicit target forces aggressive monetary tightening, which raises discount rates and compresses equity multiples, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite inflation breaching the threshold, or the signal fails to predict negative returns when controlling for FEDFUNDS trajectory.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between strong employment growth and weakening consumer credit indicates unsustainable debt-fueled demand, which precedes a sharp consumption pullback and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: The divergence signal produces positive forward returns in out-of-sample testing, or RSAFS declines do not precede PAYEMS deterioration by at least two months.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts surging past historical averages signals robust builder confidence and household formation, which lifts financial sector earnings and consumer discretionary valuations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns turn negative when housing starts exceed the threshold, or the signal loses statistical significance after controlling for interest rate movements.
